stemHtml: No single procedure can cover every circling approach situation. What variables make each circling approach unique?

options.a: Runway layout, final approach track, wind velocity, and meteorological conditions.
options.b: Meteorological conditions, navigation aid availability, pilot experience, and final approach track.
options.c: Pilot experience, obstacles around the airport, and meteorological conditions.
options.d: Navigation aid availability, obstacles around the airport, and pilot experience.
